description: You are a Senior Market Research Analyst at Apex Consumer Insights. Your firm has been hired by a retail client to segment customers by lifetime value and revenue contribution using order data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx. Create an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'customer_value_segmentation' containing three canvases using this dataset. The 'Revenue Mix' canvas must analyze total Sales distribution across Customer Segments. The 'Value Scatter' canvas must analyze the relationship between Sales and Profit by Customer Segment and include a calculated column named 'Customer_LTV' with the formula: Sales - Shipping Cost - (Sales * Discount). The 'Discount Impact' canvas must analyze Discount behavior and order value by Customer Segment and include a calculated column named 'Order_Value_Index' with the formula: Sales / Quantity Ordered. Save the completed workbook as 'customer_value_segmentation.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
